changelog: CRITICAL FIX: Fixed array access bugs preventing gameplay
Fixed: handleCellTap now accesses fixed array correctly
Fixed: Double-tap detection now works (DOUBLE_TAP_THRESHOLD initialized)
Fixed: Sticky digit mode uses correct parameters
Fixed: selectCell uses correct variable (pos instead of index)
Fixed: All settings now use AppSystems.settings correctly
Added: Popup transparency now applied correctly
Fixed: All settings references in SudokuEngine
Fixed: checkIncorrectWithLimit uses correct array access
